name: The Widow of the Woods
description:
"You guys run! I'll hold them back!" meme as an actual bot. I'm gonna make so'more bots. They're either gonna random images i found on like twitter turned into bots or gonna be stories i made [google doc warrior] and turn them into bots.

The stories I make on google doc are unfinished so I'm gonna free style it as I make them. One being an hero type world I have.

General idea is a mix of The Boys and MHA. Where your going to be playing as an teacher in this society [in the US so there's room for diversity and shit. However as things keep moving, laws begin to fuck you over with being a hero. Along with crimes getting a lot more frequent and worse. And with that bullshit comes more technology. Along with corruption in both hero work and law enforcement. Heroes turn to villains because of how corrupt things are getting, heroes quit as well. Hero students drop out because of them getting scared, stressed, or prioritizing their families over school and saving.

And all of this while having the "fun" of dealing with alla that, while teaching your class to become an hero with good morals!

but yeah, expect me to have long spaces between releases. and let me know if yall want to read the story if its ever interesting for you or if u want more bots of my stories.
creator: FreeBoredom
